Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Jul-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC, GROWTH EQUITY PARTNERS LLC, ASHOK GUJRAL MOTION TO STRIKE 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED as follows: Paragraph 5, except the following language: "Plaintiff is informed and believes, and thereon alleges, that Gujral has for many years conducted investment reals estate operation in San Francisco' . Unitl March 15, 2011 Gujral held a broker license issued by the California Bureau of Real Estate. Paragraphs 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 35, 42, 49, and Ex. 1. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.131 (b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC, GROWTH EQUITY PARTNERS LLC, ASHOK GUJRAL DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff's causes of action are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. Furthermore, Plaintiff's new allegations are not contradicting any previously made allegations. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC, GROWTH EQUITY PARTNERS LLC, ASHOK GUJRAL DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to causes of action for negligence and breach of contract are overruled. Demurrer to fraud-based causes of action is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) setting forth moving Defendant's knowledge of defects and falsity of the disclosures at the time they have been made. Plaintiff may attach 2015 disclosures to the amended complaint. All amendments shall be in bold font. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ron Lunski, 415-426-3525 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Susanne Fors.
Michael Shepherd, 510-457-3464 Defendant/Moving party SF Realty Patners LLC et al.

Argued. Plaintiff informs the Court that they did not file opposition because there was a forth amended complaint filed. The fourth amended was filed without leave of the Court. The Plaintiff sites CCP 472 (a) for filing their fourth amended complaint. Counsel for the Defendants state that they were aware of the fourth amended complaint but that there was no stipulation. The forth amended complaint was filed through file and serve on August 29, 2018 and rejected on September 9, 2018. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC, GROWTH EQUITY PARTNERS LLC, ASHOK GUJRAL DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT is Continued to September 26, 2018. Plaintiff's pposition is due by September 18, 2018. Defendant's reply is due by September 24, 2018. Moving party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
